meaning: n.内地,穷乡僻壤,内地贸易区,腹地
examples: Bailyn argues that the colonies were a half-civilized hinterland of the European culture system.
It takes a while to get used to the ways of people from Azerbaijan's rural hinterland.
So it no longer makes sense to think of this region as someone else's hinterland.
It reveals the roots and rootlets of the system reaching into the deepest hinterland.
